title: EasyTp
description:
The lightweight server plugin enables single-player saves, quick teleportation, junk cleanup, and instant suicide features.
轻量服务器插件可以单人存档 快速tp 清理垃圾 快速自杀等功能
body:
# 1.4.1
A new quick command generation feature has been added. Simply click the corresponding command in the dialog box with your mouse to generate it instantly.

新增了点击生成命令,只需要鼠标在对话栏地点击对应命令即可快捷生成命令
# 1.4
Optimized TPS command functionality
Now supports accepting or rejecting teleport requests
Input:
/tps [player name] (initiate teleport request)
/tps true (allow all current players' teleport requests)
/tps false (deny all current players' teleport requests)
/tps true [player] (allow current player to teleport to your location)
/tps false [player] (deny current player from teleporting to your location)
优化了tps命令的方法 现在可以进行同意 或者是不同意传送 输入 
/tps [对应玩家](发起传送请求)
/tps true(允许当前所有玩家传送请求)
/tps false(拒绝当前所有玩家传送请求)
/tps true [玩家](允许当前玩家传送到自己位置)
/tps false [玩家](拒绝当前玩家传送到自己位置)
# 1.3
Newly added server cleanup feature (administrator-only access) based on loaded chunks
Commands
/PascalCase true Enable service
/PascalCase false Disable service
/PascalCase time [/minutes] Cleanup interval (in minutes)
新添加了服务器打扫功能(控制权限为管理员可以使用)基于已加载的区块进行清理
指令
/PascalCase true 开启服务功能
/PascalCase false 关闭服务功能
/PascalCase time [/分钟] 多少分钟打扫一次
# 1.2
Added player suicide functionality (based on vanilla suicide; if death loot is disabled, players will die normally according to game rules)
Command: /killme
Added command help: /EasyTpHelp displays currently available commands
新增了玩家自杀功能(基于原版的自杀如果没开启死亡不掉落会根据游戏规则正常死亡)
指令/killme
新增了指令帮助/EasyTpHelp可以查看当前可以使用的指令
# 1.1
Added teleportation prompt messages (to prevent startling players while mining)
新增了tp传送提示词(防止玩家在挖矿被吓一跳)
# 1.0
Server-wide player-to-player teleportation (no permissions required) implemented
Command: /tps [player]
服务器无权限玩家互相tp诞生了
指令/tps [玩家]
